name: BFFless
compose:
name: slashnode-bffless
services:
  nginx:
    image: ghcr.io/bffless/ce-nginx:umbrel
    container_name: bffless-nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - backend
      - frontend
    environment:
      DEVICE_DOMAIN_NAME: ${DEVICE_DOMAIN_NAME:-umbrel.local}
    volumes:
      - nginx_data-config:/app/config:ro
      - nginx_data-frontend:/usr/share/nginx/html/app:ro
      - nginx_data-nginx:/etc/nginx/sites-enabled
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5537:5537
  postgres:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:0.8.2-pg17
    container_name: bffless-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: |
      postgres -c shared_buffers=64MB -c effective_cache_size=128MB -c work_mem=4MB -c maintenance_work_mem=32MB -c max_connections=20 -c wal_buffers=4MB
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: staticfilesgobrrrr
      POSTGRES_DB: assethost
    volumes:
      - postgres_data-postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - postgres_data-db-init-databases.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql:ro
  supertokens:
    image: supertokens/supertokens-postgresql:9.3
    container_name: bffless-supertokens
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      POSTGRESQL_HOST: bffless-postgres
      POSTGRESQL_PORT: '5432'
      POSTGRESQL_USER: postgres
      POSTGRESQL_PASSWORD: staticfilesgobrrrr
      POSTGRESQL_DATABASE_NAME: supertokens
      JAVA_OPTS: '-Xmx192m -Xms96m -XX:+UseSerialGC -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=64m'
      POSTGRESQL_CONNECTION_POOL_SIZE: '3'
  backend:
    image: ghcr.io/bffless/ce-backend:umbrel
    container_name: bffless-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      supertokens:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      NODE_OPTIONS: '--max-old-space-size=128'
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: '3000'
      LOG_LEVEL: error,warn,log
      APP_SEED: ${APP_SEED:-}
      APP_DATA_DIR: ${APP_DATA_DIR:-/data}
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:staticfilesgobrrrr@bffless-postgres:5432/assethost
      STORAGE_TYPE: local
      ENABLE_MINIO: 'false'
      CACHE_TYPE: memory
      ENABLE_REDIS: 'false'
      SUPERTOKENS_MODE: local
      SUPERTOKENS_CONNECTION_URI: http://bffless-supertokens:3567
      SUPERTOKENS_API_KEY: ''
      PRIMARY_DOMAIN: localhost
      FRONTEND_URL: http://localhost:5537
      API_DOMAIN: http://localhost:5537
      ADMIN_DOMAIN: localhost
      COOKIE_SECURE: 'false'
      COOKIE_DOMAIN: umbrel.local
      NGINX_SITES_PATH: /etc/nginx/sites-enabled
      NGINX_RELOAD_WAIT_MS: '3000'
      NGINX_LISTEN_PORT: '5537'
      BACKEND_HOST: backend
      PROXY_MODE: cloudflare-tunnel
      FEATURE_WILDCARD_SSL: 'false'
      FEATURE_WILDCARD_SSL_BANNER: 'false'
      FEATURE_DOMAIN_SSL_TOGGLE: 'false'
    volumes:
      - backend_data-uploads:/app/apps/backend/uploads
      - backend_data-config:/app/config:ro
      - backend_data-nginx:/etc/nginx/sites-enabled
  frontend:
    image: ghcr.io/bffless/ce-frontend:umbrel
    container_name: bffless-frontend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - backend
    volumes:
      - frontend_data-frontend:/app/dist
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  nginx_data-config:
    name: slashnode-bffless_nginx_data-config
  nginx_data-frontend:
    name: slashnode-bffless_nginx_data-frontend
  nginx_data-nginx:
    name: slashnode-bffless_nginx_data-nginx
  postgres_data-postgres:
    name: slashnode-bffless_postgres_data-postgres
  postgres_data-db-init-databases.sql:
    name: slashnode-bffless_postgres_data-db-init-databases.sql
  backend_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-bffless_backend_data-uploads
  backend_data-config:
    name: slashnode-bffless_backend_data-config
  backend_data-nginx:
    name: slashnode-bffless_backend_data-nginx
  frontend_data-frontend:
    name: slashnode-bffless_frontend_data-frontend
